name: Hermes Runtime
summary: Set up Hermes as a formal NextClaw runtime entry on the preferred narp-stdio(acp) path, with install, ACP readiness checks, runtime entry repair, and real reply smoke.

summaryI18n.en: Set up Hermes as a formal NextClaw runtime entry on the preferred narp-stdio(acp) path, with install, ACP readiness checks, runtime entry repair, and real reply smoke.
summaryI18n.zh: 把 Hermes 按首选的 narp-stdio(acp) 路径接成正式 NextClaw runtime：覆盖安装、ACP 就绪检查、runtime entry 修复与真实回复冒烟。

description: Use this skill when Hermes needs to become a formal NextClaw session type instead of an API-server-first or connector-first workaround. It guides cold-start installation, repairs missing `hermes acp` dependencies, writes or fixes the unified `agents.runtimes.entries.hermes` config, verifies session-type visibility, and finishes only after a real Hermes reply smoke succeeds.

descriptionI18n.en: Use this skill when Hermes needs to become a formal NextClaw session type instead of an API-server-first or connector-first workaround. It guides cold-start installation, repairs missing `hermes acp` dependencies, writes or fixes the unified `agents.runtimes.entries.hermes` config, verifies session-type visibility, and finishes only after a real Hermes reply smoke succeeds.
descriptionI18n.zh: 当需要把 Hermes 接成正式 NextClaw 会话类型，而不是走 API server 优先或 connector 优先的临时方案时使用此技能。它覆盖冷启动安装、`hermes acp` 依赖修复、统一 `agents.runtimes.entries.hermes` 配置写入或修复、会话类型可见性校验，并且只有在真实 Hermes 回复冒烟通过后才算完成。

author: NextClaw
